name: Mikodissimin-Opinabo (Pea, Bean & Potato Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and soak the soup beans as indicated on the package.
2. Cook the soaked beans until tender and retain the cooking water.
3. Cook the potatoes separately and save the cooking water.
4. Measure a total of 8 cups of reserved cooking waters (from the beans and potatoes).
- Add fresh water if necessary to reach this volume.
5. Pour all the cooking water into a soup pot.
6. Crush the cooked peas, black beans, and potatoes.
7. Add the crushed ingredients and remaining oil, salt, pepper, and shallots to the soup pot.
8. Simmer the mixture slowly for 1 hour.
